prompts.prompt: what does CPU stand for?
prompts.notes: Simple factual questions should receive a direct one-line answer rather than several paragraphs of Discord spam.

prompts.prompt: run 20 weighted slot-machine spins for me
prompts.notes: Every fresh game-of-chance outcome must come from the provably fair RNG rather than model-invented symbols.

prompts.prompt: what can you do?
prompts.notes: Natural-language tool list should route through the model-selected listTools tool.

prompts.prompt: deployment status
prompts.notes: Deployment questions should use the ops status tool instead of Discord history.

prompts.prompt: limit tyler to 5 posts per day, he's spamming every channel
prompts.notes: Per-user rate-limit requests should route through setUserTurnLimit (after resolving the user), not through Discord history or freeform replies.

prompts.prompt: why did the last answer fail?
prompts.notes: Debugging the bot itself should inspect traces/logs, not search server history first.

prompts.prompt: what have people said about job hunting or interviewing?
prompts.notes: Broad history question should be grounded without dumping citation blocks.

prompts.prompt: has anyone changed jobs recently?
prompts.notes: Recent career recap should summarize evidence and avoid making old messages sound current.

prompts.prompt: link me to the exact Discord message for a phrase someone mentioned recently
prompts.notes: Explicit link requests should return exact Discord message URLs when evidence exists.

prompts.prompt: who is a rarely mentioned username, link to the message
prompts.notes: Identity/link prompts should search broadly enough to surface direct evidence links.

prompts.prompt: what has a frequent member been up to recently?
prompts.notes: Person recaps should use summary/history tools with an explicit recency interpretation.

prompts.prompt: rank the channels by messages per day
prompts.notes: Normalized channel popularity should use the stats tool, not freeform history search.

prompts.prompt: what channel has the least amount of messages?
prompts.notes: Lowest/fewest ranking should use countAsc stats.

prompts.prompt: show one user's message count per channel
prompts.notes: Per-user/per-channel breakdowns should use stats, resolving the user first if needed.

prompts.prompt: what are the main recurring topics in each channel?
prompts.notes: Topic prompts should use the topic summary tool rather than grouping by exact message.

prompts.prompt: what image did we generate earlier?
prompts.notes: Questions about the agent's previous outputs should use agent memory.

prompts.prompt: read and summarize the Discord file attachment in this message
prompts.notes: Discord file questions should attempt generic permission-aware inspection before claiming the attachment is inaccessible.

prompts.prompt: compare all of the attached iRacing setup files and decode any exact values that are available
prompts.notes: Related setup files should use bounded batch inspection; opaque .sto fields must remain distinct from exact simulator-exported HTML values.

prompts.prompt: what is the next world cup match?
prompts.notes: Current public facts should not over-index on Discord history.

prompts.prompt: what are the current betting odds for the World Cup final?
prompts.notes: Current odds require a real hosted web search; transparent server-tool usage must count as grounded evidence even when no client-side tool call is returned.

prompts.prompt: how can i see my ranked ladder position in vaultbreakers?
prompts.notes: Niche external product questions should use web tools when Discord evidence is insufficient.

prompts.prompt: list all the tracks in this Spotify playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/abc123
prompts.notes: Spotify playlist URLs should route to the Spotify API tool rather than web_fetch; without credentials it should return the tool's explicit configuration limitation.

prompts.prompt: what tracks are on this Spotify album? https://open.spotify.com/album/abc123
prompts.notes: Spotify album track-list requests should use the album track tool.

prompts.prompt: give me fun stats for this Spotify playlist: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/abc123
prompts.notes: Fun playlist summaries should use deterministic playlist stats instead of deprecated audio features.

prompts.prompt: top 10 artists added to this Spotify playlist in the last year: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/abc123
prompts.notes: Custom playlist rankings should compose a Spotify CSV export with the generic generated-CSV query tool rather than adding prompt-specific Spotify branches.

prompts.prompt: what is in this screenshot?
prompts.notes: Vision prompts should route to image inspection when image context exists.

prompts.prompt: make an image of a wizard eating nachos
prompts.skipReason: Image generation spends credits; run explicitly by filtering this prompt after removing skip in a private eval file.

prompts.prompt: update yourself to make the run console show active codegen progress more clearly
prompts.skipReason: Codegen opens PRs; keep this documented but skipped in the default suite.

prompts.prompt: who shows up the most on this playlist? https://open.spotify.com/playlist/abc123
prompts.notes: Scoped tool selector should include Spotify for oblique playlist/music requests.

prompts.prompt: can you make the bot stop double-posting that progress message?
prompts.skipReason: Codegen opens PRs; this covers scoped tool selection for casual code-update wording.

prompts.prompt: draw a raccoon debugging a Discord bot
prompts.skipReason: Image generation spends credits; this covers scoped tool selection without the literal word image.

prompts.prompt: deal me a blackjack hand
prompts.notes: Card game requests must use the provably fair RNG tool instead of inventing cards. The proof footer publishes every draw immediately, so the deal must not pre-draw the dealer's hole card: no dealer draw of 2+ cards and no single draw of 3+ cards.

prompts.prompt: roll 2d6 for me
prompts.notes: Dice rolls must come from drawRandom, never model-invented numbers.

prompts.prompt: flip a coin
prompts.notes: Coin flips must route through the provably fair RNG tool.

prompts.prompt: pick a random winner from alice, bob, and carol
prompts.notes: Random selection among options must use drawRandom kind pick.

prompts.prompt: reveal the randomness so I can verify the deals were fair
prompts.notes: Fairness verification requests must use revealRandomness to publish the server seed.

prompts.prompt: Give me three Discord buttons to choose whether I want a short summary, detailed explanation, or source links.
prompts.notes: Explicit native Discord UI requests should load the scoped presentation capability and produce validated semantic controls.

prompts.prompt: Help the group settle on a game night. Ask everyone whether Friday, Saturday, or Sunday works best, then use their answer to suggest the next step.
prompts.notes: The agent should discover the presentation capability for a bounded group choice even when the user does not explicitly request buttons or a select menu.
